name: composio
description: Your agent decides what to do — Composio handles the rest. Use just-in-time tool calls across 1,000+ apps with managed auth through the hosted app or local CLI.

interface.longDescription: Your agent decides what to do — Composio handles the rest. Discover and call tools just in time across 1,000+ apps, including Slack, GitHub, Gmail, Notion, and Linear, with managed auth through the hosted app or local CLI.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
